data.content:
Related design follow-up: knot `e827` covers the broader architecture change where knot type determines workflow selection and workflows declare supported knot types. Keep `7884` focused on the builtin workflow rename/source-of-truth cleanup, but evaluate its implementation against the larger direction:
- builtin workflow id should become something like `work_sdlc`
- builtin workflow identity should come from Loom/bundle-generated definitions
- the separate `explore` lifecycle likely wants first-class type/workflow treatment rather than profile-only routing
